arguments.name: URL or input file
arguments.description: URL or file path to OpenAPI Specification file

options.name: --authorization-header
options.description: Authorization header to use for all requests

options.name: --authorization-header-variable-name
options.description:
Name of the environment variable to load the authorization
header from

options.name: --azure-scope
options.description:
Azure Entra ID Scope to use for retrieving Access Token 
for Authorization header

options.name: --azure-tenant-id
options.description:
Azure Entra ID Tenant ID to use for retrieving Access 
Token for Authorization header

options.name: --base-url
options.description:
Default Base URL to use for all requests. Use this if the 
OpenAPI spec doesn't explicitly specify a server URL.

options.name: --content-type
options.description: Default Content-Type header to use for all requests

options.name: --custom-header
options.description: Add custom HTTP headers to the generated request

options.name: --generate-intellij-tests
options.description:
Generate IntelliJ tests that assert whether the response 
status code is 200

options.name: --load-authorization-header-from-environment
options.description:
Load the authorization header from an environment variable
or define it in the .http file. You can use --authorization-header-variable-name
to specify the environment variable name.

options.name: --no-logging
options.description: Don't log errors or collect telemetry

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory

options.name: --output-type
options.description:
OneRequestPerFile generates one .http file per request. 
OneFile generates a single .http file for all requests. OneFilePerTag generates 
one .http file per first tag associated with each request.

options.name: --skip-headers
options.description: Don't generate header parameters in the files

options.name: --skip-validation
options.description: Skip validation of OpenAPI Specification file

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout (in seconds) for writing files to disk
